zh.lifeSummary: 當Annes ferch Cadwgon於1310年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾多德時，她的父親Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr40歲，母親Gwenillian ferch Cydifor45歲。她和Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan至少有11個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1386年在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annes ferch Cadwgon于1310年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾多德时，她的父亲Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr40岁，母亲Gwenillian ferch Cydifor45岁。她和Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan至少有11个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于1386年在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .

nameMeanings.name: Annes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Annes ferch Cadwgon was born in 1310, in Rhydodyn, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr, was 40 and her mother, Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, was 45. She had at least 11 sons and 7 daughters with Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan. She died in 1386, in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annes ferch Cadwgon est née en 1310, à Rhydodyn, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 11 fils et 7 filles avec Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan. Elle est décédée en 1386, à Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annes ferch Cadwgon 1310 in Rhydodyn, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr 40 und ihre Mutter Gwenillian ferch Cydifor 45. Sie hatte mit Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan mindestens 11 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1386 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annes ferch Cadwgon è nata il nel 1310 nel Rhydodyn, Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, aveva 45 anni. Lei avuto almeno 11 figli e 7 figlie con Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan. Morì nel 1386, nel Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Annes ferch Cadwgonが1310年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアルhイドディンで生まれた時，父Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawrは40歳，母Gwenillian ferch Cydiforは45歳であった。彼女はGruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwganとの間に少なくとも11人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1386年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランジェンデイルンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Annes ferch Cadwgon(이)가 1310년 웨일스 카마테실르 히도디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenillian ferch Cydifor(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랭데언에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annes ferch Cadwgon родилась в 1310 г. в местности ридодин, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, 45. У неё было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 7 дочерей от Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan. Она умерла в 1386 г. в местности ллангендирн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annes ferch Cadwgon nació en 1310, en Rhydodyn, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Gwenillian ferch Cydifor, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 11 hijos y 7 hijas con Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan. Murió en 1386, en Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
